polishReview.scope: Astro Starlight foundation shell, initial information architecture, shared token theme, and local start:all integration.
polishReview.followUp: Repeat human polish review when the reusable documentation components and flagship Button page introduce denser content layouts.

visualBaselines.reviewRequirement: Every changed baseline must be inspected in the pull request and accepted intentionally by a human reviewer.

styleExceptions.reason: Browser theme-color metadata requires a concrete color value and cannot resolve a CSS custom property.
The focus-ring separation is an accessibility measurement rather than layout spacing.
This is an approved responsive hero composition exception until a fluid semantic spacing token is introduced.
Reduced-motion overrides must disable framework and browser smooth scrolling.
Reduced-motion overrides must win over framework component transitions.
Reduced-motion overrides must win over framework component animations.
Reduced-motion overrides must prevent repeated framework animations.
